---
title: "Resources"
---

## Data Sources for Public Health GIS

::: {.resource-section}

### Philadelphia and Regional

| Source | Description | URL |
|--------|-------------|-----|
| **OpenDataPhilly** | Philadelphia's open data portal: parks, schools, crashes, 311, health, vacant lots, zoning | [opendataphilly.org](https://opendataphilly.org/) |
| **PASDA** | Pennsylvania Spatial Data Access --- state boundaries, environmental layers, transportation | [pasda.psu.edu](https://pasda.psu.edu/) |
| **DVRPC** | Delaware Valley Regional Planning Commission --- transportation, land use, equity data for the 9-county region | [dvrpc.org/data](https://www.dvrpc.org/data/) |
| **PHL Maps** | Philadelphia's ArcGIS Hub --- health department data, city services, infrastructure | [phl.maps.arcgis.com](https://phl.maps.arcgis.com/) |
| **PA DOH** | Pennsylvania Department of Health --- county-level health statistics via EpiQMS | [health.pa.gov](https://www.health.pa.gov/) |
| **PennDOT Crash Data** | Motor vehicle crash records for Pennsylvania (processed versions available via DVRPC) | [penndot.pa.gov](https://www.penndot.pa.gov/) |

: {.striped .hover}

:::

::: {.resource-section}

### National Public Health Data

| Source | Description | URL |
|--------|-------------|-----|
| **CDC PLACES** | Tract- and ZCTA-level estimates for 36 health measures (asthma, diabetes, mental health, preventive services) | [cdc.gov/places](https://www.cdc.gov/places/) |
| **CDC/ATSDR SVI** | Social Vulnerability Index at tract and county level --- 4 themes, pre-joined to Census geometry | [atsdr.cdc.gov/placeandhealth/svi](https://www.atsdr.cdc.gov/placeandhealth/svi/) |
| **CDC/ATSDR EJI** | Environmental Justice Index --- integrates environmental burden with social vulnerability | [atsdr.cdc.gov/placeandhealth/eji](https://www.atsdr.cdc.gov/placeandhealth/eji/) |
| **EPA EJScreen** | Environmental indicators at block group: PM2.5, ozone, traffic, lead paint, hazardous waste | [epa.gov/ejscreen](https://www.epa.gov/ejscreen) |
| **EPA TRI** | Toxic Release Inventory --- facility-level emissions reporting | [epa.gov/toxics-release-inventory-tri-program](https://www.epa.gov/toxics-release-inventory-tri-program) |
| **HRSA Data** | Health Professional Shortage Areas, Medically Underserved Areas, provider locations | [data.hrsa.gov](https://data.hrsa.gov/) |
| **CMS Provider Data** | Hospital, FQHC, nursing facility locations and quality measures | [data.cms.gov](https://data.cms.gov/) |
| **CDC WONDER** | Mortality and natality data at county level (with suppression for small counts) | [wonder.cdc.gov](https://wonder.cdc.gov/) |
| **NHGIS** | Historical and current Census/ACS data with pre-joined geography, standardized across decades | [nhgis.org](https://nhgis.org/) |

: {.striped .hover}

:::

::: {.resource-section}

### Environmental and Remotely Sensed Data

| Source | Description | URL |
|--------|-------------|-----|
| **NLCD** | National Land Cover Database --- 30 m land cover, impervious surface, tree canopy | [mrlc.gov](https://www.mrlc.gov/) |
| **USGS EarthExplorer** | Landsat, Sentinel-2, elevation, and other satellite imagery | [earthexplorer.usgs.gov](https://earthexplorer.usgs.gov/) |
| **PRISM Climate** | Daily and monthly temperature and precipitation grids for the U.S. | [prism.oregonstate.edu](https://prism.oregonstate.edu/) |
| **NOAA HEAT.gov** | Heat vulnerability and heat health risk products | [heat.gov](https://heat.gov/) |
| **EPA AirNow / AQS** | Air quality monitoring data | [aqs.epa.gov](https://aqs.epa.gov/) |
| **Microsoft Planetary Computer** | Cloud-hosted satellite imagery and environmental data (Landsat, Sentinel, NAIP) | [planetarycomputer.microsoft.com](https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/) |

: {.striped .hover}

:::

::: {.resource-section}

### Census and Boundary Data

| Source | Description | URL |
|--------|-------------|-----|
| **TIGER/Line Shapefiles** | All Census boundary geometries (tracts, block groups, counties, places, ZCTAs) | [census.gov/geographies/mapping-files](https://www.census.gov/geographies/mapping-files.html) |
| **ACS 5-Year Estimates** | Socioeconomic indicators at tract and block-group level | [data.census.gov](https://data.census.gov/) |
| **Census Geocoder** | Free batch geocoding service --- does not retain submitted addresses | [geocoding.geo.gov/geocoder](https://geocoding.geo.gov/geocoder/) |
| **U.S. Census Bureau** | Decennial census, population estimates, and surveys | [census.gov](https://www.census.gov/) |

: {.striped .hover}

:::

::: {.resource-section}

### Composite Indices and Equity Tools

| Source | Description | URL |
|--------|-------------|-----|
| **Area Deprivation Index (ADI)** | Block-group-level socioeconomic deprivation index | [neighborhoodatlas.medicine.wisc.edu](https://www.neighborhoodatlas.medicine.wisc.edu/) |
| **HUD USPS Vacancy** | Quarterly vacancy and no-stat address data (housing distress proxy) | [huduser.gov](https://www.huduser.gov/) |
| **NCHS Urban-Rural Classification** | CDC classification of counties by urbanization level | [cdc.gov/nchs](https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/data_access/urban_rural.htm) |

: {.striped .hover}

:::

---

## Software

::: {.resource-section}

### ArcGIS Pro

- [ArcGIS Pro download and installation](https://pro.arcgis.com/en/pro-app/latest/get-started/download-arcgis-pro.htm)
- [ArcGIS Pro system requirements](https://pro.arcgis.com/en/pro-app/latest/get-started/arcgis-pro-system-requirements.htm)
- [ArcGIS Pro documentation](https://pro.arcgis.com/en/pro-app/latest/help/main/welcome-to-the-arcgis-pro-app-help.htm)
- [ArcGIS Pro tutorials](https://pro.arcgis.com/en/pro-app/latest/get-started/pro-tutorials.htm)
- [Esri Training (free courses)](https://www.esri.com/training/)

### QGIS

- [QGIS download](https://qgis.org/en/site/forusers/download.html) --- install the Long-Term Release (LTR)
- [QGIS documentation](https://docs.qgis.org/)
- [QGIS tutorials and tips](https://www.qgistutorials.com/)

### Other Useful Tools

- [GeoDa](https://geodacenter.github.io/) --- free software for exploratory spatial data analysis, Moran's I, LISA, spatial regression
- [ColorBrewer](https://colorbrewer2.org/) --- select cartographic color schemes (sequential, diverging, qualitative) that are colorblind-safe and print-friendly
- [epsg.io](https://epsg.io/) --- look up coordinate reference systems by EPSG code or name
- [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) --- free, editable world map; useful for basemaps and amenity data
- [Overpass Turbo](https://overpass-turbo.eu/) --- query and download OpenStreetMap data
- [GTFS feeds](https://transitfeeds.com/) --- transit schedule data for access analyses

:::

---

## Tutorials and Learning Resources

::: {.resource-section}

### GIS Fundamentals

- [Esri Academy (free MOOCs)](https://www.esri.com/training/) --- Esri's official training platform with many free courses on ArcGIS Pro
- [GIS&T Body of Knowledge](https://gistbok.ucgis.org/) --- comprehensive, peer-reviewed resource on GIS concepts
- Bolstad & Manson textbook companion site: [gisfundamentals.org](https://www.gisfundamentals.org/)

### Public Health GIS

- [CDC GIS resources](https://www.cdc.gov/gis/) --- GIS applications in public health from CDC
- [WHO GIS resources](https://www.who.int/data/gis) --- global health mapping resources

### Cartography and Visualization

- [ColorBrewer](https://colorbrewer2.org/) --- essential for choosing map color schemes
- [Axis Maps Cartography Guide](https://www.axismaps.com/guide) --- practical cartographic design advice

:::
